title: The Rainbow Trail
description: Fleeing persecution, Fay Larkin is held prisoner in a hidden canyon near the Mormon village of “sealed” wives. Trespassers face a gory death, but Fay’s fiance John Shefford will stop at nothing to get her back. Encountering villainous characters and rough terrain, he goes up against the odds – even without a gun! – to save his beautiful wife-to-be.
